# Easy Day Notary

> Easy Day Notary is a licensed Florida Notary Public providing mobile
> notary and Remote Online Notarization (RON) services throughout Florida,
> including loan signing agent services for real estate closings.

Easy Day Notary helps individuals, real estate professionals, and title
companies get documents notarized in person or online, with flexible
scheduling including evenings and weekends.

## Company

- [About Easy Day Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/about): Background, mission, and values.
- [Contact](https://easydaynotary.com/contact): Phone, email, hours, and service area.
- [Schedule an Appointment](https://easydaynotary.com/schedule): Book a mobile visit or Remote Online Notary session.

## Services

- [All Services](https://easydaynotary.com/services): Overview of every notary service offered.
- [Mobile Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/mobile-notary): In-person notarization at the client's location.
- [Remote Online Notary (RON)](https://easydaynotary.com/remote-online-notary): Live video notarization available statewide in Florida.
- [Loan Signings](https://easydaynotary.com/loan-signings): Loan signing agent services for purchase, refinance, and HELOC closings.
- [Apostille Services](https://easydaynotary.com/apostille-services): Coming soon.

## Guides

- [The Complete Guide to Remote Online Notary Services in Florida](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/remote-online-notary-guide-florida): How RON works, Florida law, and getting started with BlueNotary.
- [What Is a Remote Online Notary (RON)?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/what-is-remote-online-notary): A plain-English explainer on RON vs. traditional notarization.
- [Is Online Notarization Safe?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/is-online-notarization-safe): The security and identity verification behind RON sessions.
- [Documents You Can Notarize Online](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/documents-you-can-notarize-online): Which documents work for RON and which typically don't.
- [Can You Use an Online Notary Across State Lines?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/online-notary-across-state-lines): How interstate RON recognition works.
- [Florida Mobile Notary Pricing Explained](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/florida-mobile-notary-pricing): Travel fee and notarial fee breakdown for mobile appointments.
- [What Is a Mobile Notary and How Does It Work?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/what-is-a-mobile-notary): How mobile notary appointments work end to end.
- [Weekend & After-Hours Mobile Notary Appointments](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/weekend-after-hours-mobile-notary): Evening and weekend mobile notary scheduling.
- [Mobile Notary Services for Seniors Aging in Place](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/mobile-notary-seniors-aging-in-place): Mobile notary support for independent seniors.
- [25 Common Documents That Require a Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/documents-that-require-a-notary): A categorized list of frequently notarized documents.
- [How to Notarize a Power of Attorney in Florida](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/how-to-notarize-power-of-attorney-florida): Witness requirements and the notarization process for POAs.
- [Medical vs Financial Power of Attorney](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/medical-vs-financial-power-of-attorney): The difference between the two types of POA.
- [Do Wills Need to Be Notarized in Florida?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/do-wills-need-to-be-notarized-florida): Will execution requirements and self-proving affidavits.
- [What Is a Sworn Affidavit?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/what-is-a-sworn-affidavit): What an affidavit is and how notarization fits in.
- [When Do You Actually Need a Notary?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/when-do-you-need-a-notary): When notarization is required versus optional.
- [How to Notarize a Vehicle Title in Florida](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/how-to-notarize-a-vehicle-title-florida): When a Florida title needs a notary and how the process works.
- [Traveling With a Minor: When You Need a Notarized Consent Form](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/minor-travel-consent-form-notary): Notarized travel consent requirements for minors.
- [Acceptable Identification for Florida Notarizations](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/acceptable-id-florida-notarization): What counts as valid ID for a notarization.
- [Emergency Notary Services in Florida](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/emergency-notary-services-florida): What qualifies as urgent and how fast a notary can respond.
- [Hospital Notary Services: What to Expect](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/hospital-notary-services): How hospital bedside notarizations work.
- [How Nursing Home Notary Services Work in Florida](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/nursing-home-notary-services-florida): Arranging notary visits for assisted living and nursing home residents.
- [What Happens at a Real Estate Closing?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/what-happens-at-a-real-estate-closing): A walkthrough of closing day and which documents get notarized.
- [What Does a Mobile Loan Signing Agent Do?](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/what-does-a-loan-signing-agent-do): Loan signing agent services offered by Easy Day Notary.
- [Treasure Coast Mobile Notary Services](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/treasure-coast-mobile-notary): Local coverage across Vero Beach, Sebastian, Fort Pierce, Port St. Lucie, and Stuart.
- [Vero Beach Mobile Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/vero-beach-mobile-notary): Local mobile notary coverage in Vero Beach.
- [Port St. Lucie Mobile Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/port-st-lucie-mobile-notary): Local mobile notary coverage in Port St. Lucie.
- [Fort Pierce Mobile Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/fort-pierce-mobile-notary): Local mobile notary coverage in Fort Pierce.
- [Stuart Mobile Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/stuart-mobile-notary): Local mobile notary coverage in Stuart and Martin County.
- [Florida Notary Services: What You Need to Know](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/florida-notary-services-guide): An overview of how notarization works in Florida.
- [Mobile Notary vs Remote Online Notary](https://easydaynotary.com/blog/mobile-notary-vs-online-notary): A comparison to help signers choose the right service.
